title: Tensura Ingame-Wiki
description: This project adds an ingame-wiki for the tensura reincarnated mod with several addons supported.
body: This mod adds a fully integrated in-game wiki designed specifically for the Tensura: Reincarnated ecosystem, with support for multiple compatible addons. All supported addons are automatically detected and their content is included in the encyclopedia for seamless browsing and reference. Please make sure to provide proper credit if you feature or use this mod on your public server.
